description: Cash receipt header table for Oracle Accounts Receivable. Each record represents a customer receipt, remittance, miscellaneous receipt, or reversal event and captures the amount, customer reference, receipt method, bank processing, status, and accounting context used in the order-to-cash cycle.

columns.name: CASH_RECEIPT_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the cash receipt. Used to track receipt lifecycle, applications, reversals, and accounting.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount recorded for the transaction in the transaction currency.

columns.name: SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
columns.description: Ledger identifier in which accounting entries are recorded.

columns.name: CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Currency code in which the transaction is denominated.

columns.name: RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related receivables trx record.

columns.name: PAY_FROM_CUSTOMER
columns.description: Business attribute of the cash receipt used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Current processing status of the transaction within the Oracle application flow.

columns.name: TYPE
columns.description: Business attribute of the cash receipt used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: RECEIPT_NUMBER
columns.description: Business receipt number assigned to the customer receipt.

columns.name: RECEIPT_DATE
columns.description: Date on which the customer receipt was entered or received.

columns.name: MISC_PAYMENT_SOURCE
columns.description: Business attribute of the cash receipt used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: COMMENTS
columns.description: Free-text explanation entered to document the business purpose of the record.

columns.name: DISTRIBUTION_SET_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the predefined distribution set used to default accounting information.

columns.name: REVERSAL_DATE
columns.description: Date on which the transaction or application was reversed.

columns.name: REVERSAL_CATEGORY
columns.description: Business category assigned to reversal.

columns.name: REVERSAL_REASON_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying reversal reason for the record.

columns.name: REVERSAL_COMMENTS
columns.description: Business attribute of the cash receipt used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Conversion rate type used to derive the exchange rate for the transaction.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Exchange rate used to convert the foreign currency transaction to functional currency.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Date used to derive the foreign currency conversion rate.

columns.name: REMITTANCE_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related remittance bank account record.

columns.name: CONFIRMED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether confirmed applies to the record.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the customer bank account used for receipt processing.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related customer site use record.

columns.name: DEPOSIT_DATE
columns.description: Date on which the receipt was deposited to the bank.

columns.name: PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Oracle application identifier for the concurrent program that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_ID
columns.description: Concurrent program identifier for the process that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the concurrent program last updated the record.

columns.name: RECEIPT_METHOD_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the receipt method controlling customer receipt processing.

columns.name: REQUEST_ID
columns.description: Concurrent request identifier for the program run that created or updated the record.

columns.name: SELECTED_FOR_FACTORING_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether selected for factoring applies to the record.

columns.name: SELECTED_REMITTANCE_BATCH_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related selected remittance batch record.

columns.name: FACTOR_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing factor discount for the transaction.

columns.name: USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying ussgl transaction for the record.

columns.name: USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE_CONTEXT
columns.description: Context value used to interpret the USSGL transaction code for federal reporting.

columns.name: DOC_SEQUENCE_VALUE
columns.description: Stored value associated with doc sequence.

columns.name: DOC_SEQUENCE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the document sequencing definition used to assign the transaction number.

columns.name: VAT_TAX_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related vat tax record.

columns.name: REFERENCE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control reference processing.

columns.name: REFERENCE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the referenced business entity linked to the transaction.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_RECEIPT_REFERENCE
columns.description: Business reference captured for customer receipt.

columns.name: OVERRIDE_REMIT_ACCOUNT_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether override remit account applies to the record.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier that owns the transaction in a multi-org Oracle EBS environment.

columns.name: ANTICIPATED_CLEARING_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with anticipated clearing.

columns.name: ISSUER_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with issuer.

columns.name: ISSUE_DATE
columns.description: Date on which the document or instrument was issued.

columns.name: ISSUER_BANK_BRANCH_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related issuer bank branch record.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_BANK_BRANCH_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related customer bank branch record.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control mrc exchange rate processing.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value mrc exchange for the transaction.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with mrc exchange.

columns.name: PAYMENT_SERVER_ORDER_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence payment server order.

columns.name: APPROVAL_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying approval for the record.

columns.name: ADDRESS_VERIFICATION_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying address verification for the record.

columns.name: TAX_RATE
columns.description: Tax rate applied to calculate the tax amount.

columns.name: ACTUAL_VALUE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with actual value.

columns.name: POSTMARK_DATE
columns.description: Postmark date associated with mailing or receipt handling.

columns.name: APPLICATION_NOTES
columns.description: Business attribute of the cash receipt used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: UNIQUE_REFERENCE
columns.description: Business reference captured for unique.

columns.name: PROMISE_SOURCE
columns.description: Business attribute of the cash receipt used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: REC_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence rec version nu.

columns.name: CC_ERROR_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying cc error for the record.

columns.name: CC_ERROR_TEXT
columns.description: Detailed text associated with cc error.

columns.name: CC_ERROR_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether cc error applies to the record.

columns.name: REMIT_BANK_ACCT_USE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related remit bank acct use record.

columns.name: OLD_CUSTOMER_BANK_BRANCH_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related old customer bank branch record.

columns.name: OLD_ISSUER_BANK_BRANCH_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related old issuer bank branch record.

columns.name: LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the legal entity responsible for the transaction.

columns.name: PAYMENT_TRXN_EXTENSION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related payment trxn extension record.

columns.name: AX_ACCOUNTED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether ax accounted applies to the record.

columns.name: OLD_CUSTOMER_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related old customer bank account record.

columns.name: CASH_APPLN_OWNER_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related cash appln owner record.

columns.name: WORK_ITEM_ASSIGNMENT_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with work item assignment.

columns.name: WORK_ITEM_REVIEW_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with work item review.

columns.name: WORK_ITEM_STATUS_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying work item status for the record.

columns.name: WORK_ITEM_REVIEW_NOTE
columns.description: Business attribute of the cash receipt used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PREV_PAY_FROM_CUSTOMER
columns.description: Business attribute of the cash receipt used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PREV_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related prev customer site use record.

columns.name: WORK_ITEM_EXCEPTION_REASON
columns.description: Business reason captured for work item exception.

columns.name: AUTOMATCH_SET_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related automatch set record.

columns.name: AUTOAPPLY_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether autoapply applies to the record.

columns.name: SEQ_TYPE_LAST
columns.description: Business attribute of the cash receipt used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

business_questions: Show customer cash receipts entered during a date range.
Find unapplied or partially applied cash receipts.
List reversed or NSF receipts with reversal details.
Show cash receipts by customer, receipt method, or bank account.
Identify high-value receipts above a business threshold.
Display receipt status and remittance information.
Find receipts awaiting confirmation or clearing.
Show miscellaneous receipts and their accounting attributes.
